\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Analytic helpers for singularity subtraction on a single triangle. 

Given a triangle (from a RWG function) and an observation point r, this class computes line and surface integrals of $ R^q (q \in \{-3,-1,1,3\}) $, and the derived vector expressions {\ttfamily K1-\/\+K4} used in PMCHWT kernels.

Typical use\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Call \doxylink{classSingSub_a20337fe20529d26c1775c8ba6d47cad0}{Set\+Triangle\+RWG()} once for a new triangle/point pair.
\item Use {\ttfamily K1-\/\+K4} or {\ttfamily IL/\+IS} repeatedly without recomputing geometry.
\item If only the RWG/triangle changes but r stays the same, call \doxylink{classSingSub_a9d74100325023b4d1c156bd97ae240b3}{Change\+Triangle\+RWG()} and reuse the cached r-\/dependent terms. 
\end{DoxyItemize}

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{SingSub_8h_source_l00036}{36}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{SingSub_8h_source}{Sing\+Sub.\+h}}.

\Hypertarget{classSingSub_a446879b799b19a2a606477fd316eb460}\index{SingSub@{SingSub}!IL@{IL}}
\index{IL@{IL}!SingSub@{SingSub}}
\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{IL()}{IL()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{classSingSub_a446879b799b19a2a606477fd316eb460} 
double Sing\+Sub\+::\+IL (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{int}]{q}{, }\item[{int}]{tri\+Edge\+Index}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



Exact line integral $\int_{edge} R^q\,ds$ along a triangle edge. 


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em q} & Power of R (allowed\+: -\/1, 1, 3). \\
\hline
{\em tri\+Edge\+Index} & Edge index (0,1,2) in the triangle\textquotesingle{}s local ordering. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
Value of the integral.
\end{DoxyReturn}
Exact line integral of $ R^q $ along edge tri\+Edge\+Index.

Handles endpoints where {\ttfamily Rp==0} or {\ttfamily Rm==0} in a way suitable for singularity subtraction\+: the logarithmic divergence of IL(-\/1) at the vertex is cancelled by its prefactor in the combined expressions; for q\texorpdfstring{$>$}{>}−1, the log term is multiplied by R0\texorpdfstring{$^\wedge$}{\string^}2 which vanishes at those endpoints.

\Hypertarget{classSingSub_ae84ba8e91ca5a0aeee4246d8ee0f033d}\index{SingSub@{SingSub}!Init@{Init}}
\index{Init@{Init}!SingSub@{SingSub}}
\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{Init()}{Init()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{classSingSub_ae84ba8e91ca5a0aeee4246d8ee0f033d} 
int Sing\+Sub\+::\+Init (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{classRWGFun}{RWGFun}} \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{rwg\+In}{, }\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_ae4271193b04e5d22237184d4fad54fb0}{rvec}}}]{r\+In}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



Initialize with triangle from RWG and observation point r. 

Computes edge normals, distances t\+\_\+i, signed plane distance h, and signed solid angle omega. Use this when you want a single call that refreshes all geometric cache for both triangle and r.


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em rwg\+In} & RWG function whose triangle is integrated over. \\
\hline
{\em r\+In} & Observation point. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
0 on success.
\end{DoxyReturn}
Initialize with triangle from RWG and observation point r.

Computes\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item unit edge-\/normal directions (tangent x Ref\+Normal\+Vector) for each edge,
\item signed distances t\+\_\+i from r to the three supporting lines,
\item signed plane distance h = n(r − r0), with n = Ref\+Normal\+Vector(),
\item signed solid angle omega subtended by the triangle at r.
\end{DoxyItemize}

The solid angle sign follows the sign of h. 

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{SingSub_8cpp_source_l00033}{33}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{SingSub_8cpp_source}{Sing\+Sub.\+cpp}}.

\Hypertarget{classSingSub_a20337fe20529d26c1775c8ba6d47cad0}\index{SingSub@{SingSub}!SetTriangleRWG@{SetTriangleRWG}}
\index{SetTriangleRWG@{SetTriangleRWG}!SingSub@{SingSub}}
\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{SetTriangleRWG()}{SetTriangleRWG()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{classSingSub_a20337fe20529d26c1775c8ba6d47cad0} 
int Sing\+Sub\+::\+Set\+Triangle\+RWG (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{classRWGFun}{RWGFun}} \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{rwg\+In}{, }\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_ae4271193b04e5d22237184d4fad54fb0}{rvec}}}]{r\+In}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



Preferred initialization that fills all cached arrays (ILar/\+ISar). 

Precomputes the line integrals along edges and the surface integrals for $q \in \{-3,-1,1,3\}$, saving them in {\ttfamily ILar/\+ISar}; subsequent calls to {\ttfamily K1-\/\+K4/\+IL/\+IS} reuse these values.


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em rwg\+In} & RWG function defining the triangle. \\
\hline
{\em r\+In} & Observation point. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
0 on success.
\end{DoxyReturn}
Preferred initialization\+: precompute ILar/\+ISar for the triangle at r.

Sets\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item h and omega as in \doxylink{classSingSub_ae84ba8e91ca5a0aeee4246d8ee0f033d}{Init()},
\item e\+Nar\mbox{[}i\mbox{]} (unit edge-\/normals) and tar\mbox{[}i\mbox{]} = −e\+Nar\mbox{[}i\mbox{]}·(Node(i)−r),
\item ILar\mbox{[}i\mbox{]}\mbox{[}k\mbox{]} for q = \{-\/1,1,3\} (k = 0,1,2),
\item ISar\mbox{[}k\mbox{]} for q = \{-\/3,-\/1,1,3\} (k = 0..3). 
\end{DoxyItemize}
